changes: Replaced verbose 573-line generic SKILL.md with focused 100-line CSV analysis guide
Removed SQL templates, visualization guides, report templates, and other irrelevant content
Added concrete pandas code patterns for aggregation, pivoting, groupby, and JSON output
Added explicit revenue calculation guidance (amount*quantity vs direct column)
Added multi-dataset analysis patterns (low stock detection, churn/retention calculation)
Added prominent data cleaning report section with exact counting methodology
Removed unreferenced files: scripts/data-init.sh, scripts/query.sh, WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv
Iteratively refined data cleaning report counting instructions across 5 iterations
notes: data-clean task loses 15 points on report-accuracy criterion: model consistently counts dates_standardized=7 (all rows) instead of 5 (unique rows only). The task prompt says 'counted before dedup' which the model interprets literally despite skill guidance to count on deduplicated rows. This appears to be a fundamental tension between the task prompt wording and the test expectation.
